texto: I do a lot of work on computers, but I am so practiced in drawing that I can draw it full size, and you can take the measurements off my drawings. It's like drafting, but it's a work of art - a really beautiful drawing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Charles Pollock: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “I do a lot of work on computers, but I am so practiced in drawing that I can draw it full size, a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, art pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e art.

frase_original: I do a lot of work on computers, but I am so practiced in drawing that I can draw it full size, and you can take the measurements off my drawings. It's like drafting, but it's a work of art - a really beautiful drawing.
